; Mitchell Scott (https://github.com/rmitchellscott)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-05-27T20:20:47Z

AFFECT [[1658694193319203921]]
    IMPORT [[7081846004279]] [[180927.180926]]

    TRAVERSE [[6502786168]]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL INSERT {
            property ~&214620122227&~ notebookHorizontalOffset: _preventNotebookZoomOutSettings.horizontalOffset

            ~&6502786168&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: _preventNotebookZoomOutSettings
                property ~&197088788&~ horizontalOffset: -300

                ~&7712198086779994&~ {
                    ~&7712874798136519&~: "rmitchellscott.preventNotebookZoomOut"
                    property ~&214620122227&~ horizontalOffset: _preventNotebookZoomOutSettings.horizontalOffset
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[12656844379588783144]]
    TRAVERSE [[3819512207256720568]]#[[6504254477]] > [[8398580812105622257]]#[[254529542087036966]] > [[6502786168]]#[[486471031355863065]] > [[14125623155555875541]]#[[7082545991543]]
        LOCATE BEFORE [[7712155293725601]]
        INSERT {
            ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214599571833&~ {
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&214632764553&~: ~&6504222003&~("Notebook horizontal offset")
                ~&15814908402952843900&~: ~&254501558939456351&~ {
                    ~&425121728314878811&~.~&233682147553943&~ {
                        ~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("Shifts the default view in portrait. Negative = left, positive = right.")
                        ~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
                        ~&7713748390489352&~: ~&6503165774&~.~&7712381377343359&~
                        ~&7081629735527&~.~&499747351624466981&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&233744706647566&~.~&7083363878252&~
                    }
                    ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
                        ~&6504337259&~: ~&254477762679831355&~.~&7081261925573&~.~&254547519794454865&~
                        ~&6504315758&~: "−"
                        ~&254542236275632405&~: ~&7082020628281&~.notebookHorizontalOffset = ~&6502909715&~.~&197092719&~(-600, ~&7082020628281&~.notebookHorizontalOffset - 10)
                    }
                    ~&6502786168&~ {
                        ~&214646099849&~: 80
                        ~&7082729686082&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082729686082&~
                        ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214594815081&~ {
                            ~&6504315758&~: ~&7082020628281&~.notebookHorizontalOffset.~&7713616118928163&~()
                            ~&233721384511543&~.~&7712879746914881&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                        }
                    }
                    ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
                        ~&6504337259&~: ~&254477762679831355&~.~&7081261925573&~.~&254547519794454865&~
                        ~&6504315758&~: ~&"180916&~
                        ~&254542236275632405&~: ~&7082020628281&~.notebookHorizontalOffset = ~&6502909715&~.~&197092973&~(600, ~&7082020628281&~.notebookHorizontalOffset + 10)
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[11806562588218124596]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]] > [[254480451320573660]]#[[18007182163571081861]] > [[254502432014417618]]#[[6504391364]]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            readonly property ~&197088788&~ horizontalOffset: ~&7082020628281&~.notebookHorizontalOffset

            /* Handles initial page load and non-preloaded page turns (fires when view becomes Active)*/
            ~&17742136325200165396&~: {
                ~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.~&7713361680718652&~ && ~&6504254477&~.~&495572996767745525&~?.~&14593461789319363686&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&7083177691309&~ === ~&254502432014417618&~.~&7081201431845&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&8399340108982949229&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&233748328658231&~) {
                    ~&5971598&~.~&254524858248187773&~(function() {
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&6504391364&~.~&7083177691309&~ === ~&254502432014417618&~.~&7081201431845&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&8399340108982949229&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&233748328658231&~) {
                            ~&214622607920&~ ~&7082534202858&~ = ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(
                                ~&6504391364&~.~&4161556510681018511&~.~&180993&~ + ~&6504391364&~.horizontalOffset,
                                ~&6504391364&~.~&4161556510681018511&~.~&180994&~
                            );
                            ~&6504391364&~.~&10753335312005174244&~(~&7082534202858&~, ~&6504391364&~.~&15777890623490054006&~);
                            ~&6504254477&~.~&2491156027386016279&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
                        }
                    });
                }
            }
            /* Handles page turns (fires when preloaded view becomes visible)*/
            ~&13733777459642361598&~: {
                ~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.~&7713361680718652&~ && ~&6504254477&~.~&495572996767745525&~?.~&14593461789319363686&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&233748328658231&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&7083177691309&~ === ~&254502432014417618&~.~&7081201431845&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&8399340108982949229&~) {
                    ~&5971598&~.~&254524858248187773&~(function() {
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&6504391364&~.~&233748328658231&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&7083177691309&~ === ~&254502432014417618&~.~&7081201431845&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&8399340108982949229&~) {
                            ~&214622607920&~ ~&7082534202858&~ = ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(
                                ~&6504391364&~.~&4161556510681018511&~.~&180993&~ + ~&6504391364&~.horizontalOffset,
                                ~&6504391364&~.~&4161556510681018511&~.~&180994&~
                            );
                            ~&6504391364&~.~&10753335312005174244&~(~&7082534202858&~, ~&6504391364&~.~&15777890623490054006&~);
                            ~&6504254477&~.~&2491156027386016279&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
                        }
                    });
                }
            }

            /* Handles orientation changes: apply offset in portrait, reset in landscape*/
            ~&428051690305612204&~ {
                ~&7083194890448&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&495572996767745525&~
                ~&233726547792244&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&7713361680718652&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&7083177691309&~ === ~&254502432014417618&~.~&7081201431845&~
                function ~&4934706584521522300&~() {
                    ~&5971598&~.~&254524858248187773&~(function() {
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&6504391364&~.~&7083177691309&~ === ~&254502432014417618&~.~&7081201431845&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&8399340108982949229&~ && ~&6504391364&~.~&233748328658231&~) {
                            ~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.~&495572996767745525&~?.~&14593461789319363686&~) {
                                /* Portrait: apply custom offset*/
                                ~&214622607920&~ ~&7082534202858&~ = ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(
                                    ~&6504391364&~.~&4161556510681018511&~.~&180993&~ + ~&6504391364&~.horizontalOffset,
                                    ~&6504391364&~.~&4161556510681018511&~.~&180994&~
                                );
                                ~&6504391364&~.~&10753335312005174244&~(~&7082534202858&~, ~&6504391364&~.~&15777890623490054006&~);
                                ~&6504254477&~.~&2491156027386016279&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
                            } ~&6503784146&~ {
                                ~&6504391364&~.~&7243424524927826498&~();
                                ~&6504254477&~.~&2491156027386016279&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
                            }
                        }
                    });
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
